summary: iOS 👀 FALCON | DFU - App incorrectly shows device upto date after failure
scenario: After a DFU update failure for the headset, the app incorrectly displays the device as up to date and shows both headset and charge stand as successfully updated, even though the headset was not actually updated.
description_clean: After a DFU update failure for the headset, the app incorrectly displays the device as up to date. When the user retries, the update is shown as unavailable, and the main SW update section shows both headset and charge stand as successfully updated to the latest build, even though the headset was not actually updated.
steps: Trigger a DFU update for the headset and let it fail.
Observe the app's display after the failure.
Check the main SW update section for both headset and charge stand status.
expected: The app should indicate that the headset update failed and allow the user to retry. The main SW update section should show the headset as not updated.
actual: The app incorrectly displays the device as up to date. When retrying, the update is shown as unavailable. The main SW update section shows both headset and charge stand as successfully updated to the latest build, even though the headset was not actually updated.
